title: Open the app and verify the location is set to San Francisco, CA
test_steps: Open the app | Verify the location is set to San Francisco, CA
expected_result: The app should display 'San Francisco, CA' in the header

title: Click on the Back Arrow to navigate to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the Back Arrow | Verify navigation to the previous screen
expected_result: The app should navigate to the previous screen

title: Search for a different location
test_steps: Click on the Search Icon | Enter a different location name | Press Enter | Verify the new location is displayed
expected_result: The new location should be displayed in the header

title: Verify the radar image is displayed correctly
test_steps: Verify the radar image is displayed correctly | Check for any missing or incorrect weather patterns
expected_result: The radar image should display the correct weather patterns for San Francisco, CA

title: Verify the Rain, Mixed, and Snow Legend is displayed
test_steps: Verify the Rain, Mixed, and Snow Legend is displayed at the bottom of the radar image
expected_result: The legend should be displayed at the bottom of the radar image

title: Verify the Time and Location are displayed correctly
test_steps: Verify the Time and Location are displayed correctly | Check for any incorrect or missing information
expected_result: The Time and Location should be displayed correctly as '10:35 AM PDT' and 'San Francisco, CA'

title: Verify the Bottom Navigation Bar is functional
test_steps: Click on each icon in the Bottom Navigation Bar | Verify navigation to the corresponding screen
expected_result: The app should navigate to the corresponding screen for each icon

title: Verify the app is accessible and usable
test_steps: Perform a screen reader test on the app | Check for any usability issues such as missing labels or confusing navigation
expected_result: The app should be accessible and usable without any issues

title: Verify data persistence when the app is closed and reopened
test_steps: Close the app | Reopen the app | Verify the radar image and location are still displayed
expected_result: The radar image and location should still be displayed
